source: The version-pinned official PyPI Vyper compilers generated every bytecode. Their installed official compile_ir.py source defines the three footer encodings.
contract: minimal-<version>.vy exposes a single pure-size view function ping() returning 1.

0.3.4.style: fixed 11-byte CBOR map, no length field; present in runtime and embedded runtime in creation

0.3.9.style: CBOR map plus two-byte payload length that excludes the length field; present in runtime and embedded runtime in creation

0.3.10.style: four-element CBOR creation tuple plus two-byte inclusive total length; runtime has no auxdata
